docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MELLO III, EDWARD AS TO DEFENDANT CLAYTON HOLDINGS, INC. A CALIF. CORP. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
